title: Evaluation and identification of Senecio alkaloids in conditions of Slovak Republic
author: Fodran, Peter
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Food Safety and Nutrition Department received request of scientists from national scientific group for Contaminants in food chain to prepare an opinion on evaluation and identification of Senecio alkaloids in conditions of Slovak Republic. During previous years there has been spread of Senecio species on meadows and pastures what can lead to presence of pyrrolizidine alkaloids in honey or in cow's milk after consumption of young plants of Senecio species. Seeing that reproducibility of pyrrolizidine alkaloids isolation methods is mean, the aim of this request is to prepare opinion on determination and identification of Senecio alkaloids in green mass. Request was approved by Food Safety and Nutrition Committee.
